tuv.seg: ability to cast 3rd-rank or higher spells from spell slots
ability to cast 6th-rank or higher spells from spell slots

ability to cast heal and harm
ability to cast humanoid form or illusory disguise
ability to cast spells from slots

tu.note: "self:caster" considers only class and not dedications

tuv.seg: ability to cast spells from spell slots
ability to cast spells from spell slots or focus points
ability to cast summon undead from spell slots or you are an ossuarite druid
ability to cast the detect magic cantrip
ability to cast wall of fire
able to cast animate dead with a spell slot

tu.note: "self:caster" considers only class and not dedications

tuv.seg: able to cast spells using spell slots

aether, vitality, or void kinetic element
alter ego dedication or archaeologist dedication
alter ego dedication or vigilante dedication
an implement that grants a reaction
and will do so once more
any feat with the oath trait

class granting no more hit points per level than 6 + your constitution
class granting no more hit points per level than 8 + your constitution modifier

coiled as the serpent or wings of the wyrm
compact predator, puff up, or squirt blood

dragon shape, elemental shape, plant shape, or soaring shape
dueling riposte, mirror shield, or twin riposte

expert in a connection skill other than that of your chosen connection

you can cast spells from spell slots or have a focus pool
you can cast the shield cantrip
you can't already use the rage action

you do not have the holy or unholy trait
you do not have the sakhil rejection feat
you don't have a swim speed

you follow the laws of mortality

you have an aether kinetic gate
you have delete in your spell database
you have not been sanctified by a deity
you have the fungus or plant trait
you have the holy or unholy trait
you must have a class that casts spells with a spell repertoire
you must have a class, such as clerics, druids, witches, and wizards, that prepares spells in spell slots using the same number of prepared spells per day
you must have a spellcasting class feature that chooses spells from the arcane or divine spell list
you must have a spellcasting class feature that chooses spells from the arcane or primal spell list
you worship a deity or follow a philosophy

you worship a deity with the dragon domain
